summary: Frontend-only layout verification of the Contracts table tightening fix. Tested at 1366x768 (EN+TET) and 1920x900 (EN). Other tables (Items/Payments/Auctions/Clients) verified non-regressed. The fix WORKS for English at 1366 and for both languages at 1920, but the original bug PERSISTS in Tetum at 1366: the Actions column still overflows the wrapper, and the rightmost delete button is clipped outside the viewport.

ui_bugs.issue: BUG NOT FULLY FIXED. At viewport 1366x768 with TET active, table content width = 1099px but wrapper clientWidth = 1044px (scrollW>clientW => overflow=true). The Actions cell renders with lastCellRight=1388 while viewportW=1366, so the rightmost contract-delete button (x=1356, w=24, right=1380) is clipped (visible:false). Long Tetum headers like 'MONTANTE EMPRÉSTIMU' and 'DATA KONTRATU → DATA LIMITE' (both whitespace-nowrap on Th) expand cell widths beyond the available wrapper. Screenshot of 1366 TET confirms only partial action icons visible at the right edge.

issues: The long Tetum header strings combined with whitespace-nowrap on Th force a min table width > parent wrapper. Padding/font tightening alone is insufficient — header columns should be allowed to wrap (remove whitespace-nowrap on Th OR abbreviate the i18n strings) so the table fits in 1024-1044px of available space at 1366 viewport (sidebar ~256px + margins).

Item cell uses max-w-[160px] but lacks the `truncate` Tailwind class on the td (only the inner span has truncate). Inline-block + max-w on a span without overflow:hidden does not actually truncate; long item names can still expand the column. Verify intent vs. iter12 fix.

action_items: Fix Tetum overflow at 1366: remove `whitespace-nowrap` from the Th component (line ~563 in Contracts.js) OR shorten Tetum header keys for 'loan_amount' and 'contract_date_due_date' in the i18n dictionary so the table no longer exceeds the wrapper.
Consider sticky-right or horizontal scroll on the table wrapper as a defensive measure so action buttons never get clipped silently.
Optionally add `truncate` class on the Item Td (line 398) to actually enforce max-w-[160px], so unusually long item labels cannot push the Actions column off-screen.
critical_code_review_comments: Th has `whitespace-nowrap` (line 563) which negates much of the padding/font tightening when long localized strings are used. Either wrap headers or localize shorter labels.
Td for Item (max-w-[160px]) lacks `truncate` class — the constraint is not actually enforced on the cell.
Action buttons are 24x24 — at the lower bound of accessibility tap target (recommended 44x44 mobile / 24x24 acceptable desktop). Still clickable via data-testid; verified inViewport at 1920.
Pre-auction-card (data-testid='pre-auction-card') renders correctly, no overflow at any tested viewport.
seed_data_creation: None — used existing 41 pre-auction + remaining contracts.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Measurements at 1366x768 TET: tableRight=1388, viewportW=1366, wrapperScrollW=1099 vs clientW=1044. Delete button right=1380 > 1366 (clipped). 1366 EN works fine (tableRight=1343). 1920 EN works fine (overflow=false). Items/Payments/Auctions/Clients all overflow=false (no regression). All 8 Tetum headers verified present. PDF/reactivate/auction/whatsapp/delete testids confirmed wired on the rows.
rca of the issue: ROOT CAUSE: The Th component still applies `whitespace-nowrap` to header cells. In Tetum, 'MONTANTE EMPRÉSTIMU' (19 chars) and 'DATA KONTRATU → DATA LIMITE' (27 chars) cannot wrap, forcing those columns to a minimum width equal to the un-wrapped text. The resulting min-content width of the table (1099px) exceeds the wrapper's clientWidth (1044px at 1366 viewport with the 256px sidebar). The padding/font tightening in iter15 reduced overall width but not enough to absorb the longest Tetum strings. MITIGATION: (1) Remove whitespace-nowrap from Th and allow the header to wrap to 2 lines, OR (2) shorten the Tetum translations to fit (e.g., 'MONTANTE' / 'DATA → LIMITE'), OR (3) make the wrapper horizontally scrollable so the cut-off isn't silent. REPRODUCTION: Login as admin → navigate to /contracts → click TET in sidebar → set viewport to 1366x768 → observe rightmost action buttons clipped at the right edge of the wrapper.
